query: I just bulk-added 15 new concept pages by hand outside of an ingest run. The wiki/index.md dataview view seems to be missing some of them. What do I do?
expected_behavior: Identifies this as a stale _index.md mirror issue and runs python3 tools/wiki.py index --rebuild rather than hand-editing _index.md
Explicitly states _index.md is a generated file that must never be hand-edited
Also checks/fixes wikilink dual-link coverage via python3 tools/wiki.py links --fix --write for the newly added pages
Notes that wiki/index.md itself (the live Dataview view inside Obsidian) updates on its own, distinguishing it from the generated _index.md mirrors
